list.title: Stories
list.welcomeBody: Create your first story to begin. Everything stays on this device.
list.noResults: No stories match your search or filters.

delete.title: Delete this story?
delete.body: This permanently removes the story and all its branches, entries, and world data. This cannot be undone.

storyRecovery.definitionBody: This story's definition is corrupted. Aventuras has no safe default to replace it.
storyRecovery.settingsBody: This story's settings are corrupted. You can restore them from your current app defaults without changing the story's content.
storyRecovery.confirmBody: This replaces only this story's settings with your current app defaults.
storyRecovery.confirmWarning: The story definition, branches, entries, entities, and world data stay intact.

newStory.body: You have an unfinished story in progress. Continue where you left off, or discard it and start fresh?

draft.body: You have an unfinished story in progress. Continue it, or discard it and open "{{draftName}}" instead?

errors.openFailed: Couldn't open the story. Please try again.
errors.favoriteFailed: Couldn't update favorite. Please try again.
errors.archiveFailed: Couldn't update the story. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the story. Please try again.
errors.resetStorySettingsFailed: Couldn't reset this story's settings. Please try again.
errors.openDatabaseFileFailed: Couldn't show the database file. Please try again.
errors.discardSessionFailed: Couldn't discard the session. Please try again.
errors.draftLoadFailed: Couldn't open the draft. Please try again.
errors.resumeSessionFailed: Couldn't resume the session. Please try again.
errors.sessionStateCorrupt: Your saved progress couldn't be restored and was reset.
